AR1.justification: Procedural output correctly kept in tmp/; daybook used as chronological surface; no explicit rationale stated for avoiding decisions.md (unlike runs 2/3 which articulate the strict-bar reasoning).

AR2.justification: Step 1 produced tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md with template + MISSING markers; step 2 added Go/No-go decision under the required header in the same file with 4 sentences naming items.

AR3.justification: All paths relative, ISO date daybook header, Generated-by marker per methodology; references resolve.

AR4.justification: Daybook 2026-05-17.md created with structured sections; same-day re-run would overwrite Intent/Log instead of appending, though per-day filename pattern keeps state coherent.
